data.label: Grey (Fluoride)
data.prep: Patient must fast for 8-12 hours. Water allowed.

data.label: Grey (Fluoride)
data.prep: Collect exactly 2 hours after a standard meal. Note meal time.

data.label: Grey (Fluoride)
data.prep: No fasting required.

data.label: Red / SST
data.prep: Collect between 8-9 AM. Patient should be awake for at least 1 hour.

data.label: Red / SST
data.prep: Collect between 4-6 PM.

data.label: Urine Container
data.prep: Midstream clean-catch urine. First morning preferred for albumin tests.

data.label: 24h Urine Container
data.prep: Discard first morning void. Collect ALL urine for 24h. Refrigerate during collection.

data.label: Red / SST
data.prep: Avoid prolonged tourniquet. Do not clench fist repeatedly.

data.label: Lavender (EDTA)
data.prep: Transport on ice immediately. Process within 15 minutes of collection. CRITICAL.

data.label: Red / SST
data.prep: 12 hour fast required. No alcohol 24h prior. Water allowed.

default.label: Lavender (EDTA)
default.prep: Mix gently by inversion 8-10 times. Do not shake.

data.label: Blue (Citrate 3.2%)
data.prep: Fill tube EXACTLY to mark. Ratio critical (9:1 blood:citrate). Mix gently 4 times.

data.label: Lavender (EDTA)
data.prep: Must be processed within 1 hour of collection.

data.label: Lavender (EDTA) + Slides
data.prep: Prepare thin and thick smear immediately. Collect during fever spike if possible.

data.label: Lavender (EDTA)
data.prep: No fasting required. Reflects 3-month average.

data.label: Lavender (EDTA)
data.prep: Label carefully with patient name and DOB. Critical test.

default.label: Red / SST
default.prep: Allow to clot 30 min. Centrifuge before transport.

data.label: Red / SST
data.prep: Note menstrual cycle day on request form. Prolactin: avoid stress, collect after 30 min rest.

data.label: Red / SST
data.prep: Patient must rest quietly for 30 minutes before collection. Avoid stress, breast stimulation.

data.label: Red / SST
data.prep: Fasting insulin: 8-12h fast. Transport on ice. Process within 1h.

data.label: Lavender (EDTA) on ICE
data.prep: CRITICAL: Collect in chilled EDTA tube. Transport on ice. Process within 30 min. Collect 8-9 AM.

data.label: Lavender (EDTA)
data.prep: Note patient posture (upright/supine) and duration on form. Collect after specified posture maintained.

data.label: Red / SST
data.prep: Protect from light after collection.

data.label: Red / SST
data.prep: No B12 supplements 24h prior. Protect from light.

data.label: Red / SST
data.prep: Note LMP on request. Serum more sensitive than urine.

data.label: Red / SST
data.prep: Note exact time of each sample. Patient should be at rest. Avoid stress.

default.label: Red / SST
default.prep: Allow to clot 30 min before centrifuge.

data.label: Red / SST
data.prep: Best collected after 5-7 days of fever. Note fever duration on form.

data.label: Red / SST
data.timing: NS1: first 5 days. IgM: after day 5
data.prep: NS1 antigen: collect in first 5 days of fever. IgM/IgG: after day 5.

data.label: Red / SST
data.prep: Handle as biohazard. Double bag. Label clearly.

data.label: Red / SST
data.prep: Note gestational age if pregnant. Larger volume needed for full panel.

data.label: Not applicable
data.prep: Intradermal injection of 0.1 mL PPD on forearm. Read result at 48-72 hours. Mark site.

default.label: Urine Container
default.prep: Midstream clean-catch. First morning specimen preferred.

data.label: Stool Container
data.prep: Fresh specimen within 1 hour. Do not contaminate with urine or water.

data.label: Sterile wide-mouth container
data.prep: 2-5 days sexual abstinence. Collect by masturbation. Keep at body temperature. Deliver within 30 min.

data.label: Urine Container
data.prep: First morning urine. Most concentrated. HCG highest in morning.

default.label: Culture Swab / Container
default.prep: Collect BEFORE starting antibiotics if possible.

data.label: Blood Culture Bottles (Aerobic + Anaerobic)
data.prep: CRITICAL: Strict asepsis. Disinfect skin 2 min. Collect during fever spike or rigors. Inoculate aerobic bottle first.

data.label: Sterile Urine Container
data.prep: Clean genitalia. Discard first stream. Collect midstream in sterile container. First morning specimen best.

data.label: Sterile Sputum Container
data.prep: Early morning. Deep cough — not saliva. Rinse mouth with water first. 3 consecutive morning samples for AFB.

data.label: Special TB tube / Sterile container
data.prep: Early morning specimen. For QFT: collect in 3 specific tubes (nil, antigen, mitogen). Process within 16h.

data.label: Sterile Swab / Container
data.prep: Aspirate preferred over swab. Clean wound surface first. Collect from deepest part.

data.label: LBC Vial (CytoLyt/PreservCyt)
data.prep: No intercourse/douching 48h prior. Not during menstruation. Broom device in vial — swirl 10 times.

data.label: Slides + Fixative
data.prep: Prepare smear immediately. Air-dry one slide, fix other in 95% alcohol. Label both.

data.label: Sterile Container + EDTA
data.prep: Send entire specimen. Process within 1 hour. Also send EDTA aliquot for cell count.

default.label: 10% Formalin Container
default.prep: Place in 10% formalin immediately. Volume of formalin must be 10x tissue volume. Label container, not lid.

default.label: Lavender (EDTA)
default.prep: Do not freeze. Transport at room temperature. Karyotype: 10 mL preferred.

data.label: Sterile container
data.prep: Procedure sample — send immediately at room temperature. Label with GA and procedure date.

data.label: Streck tube (Cell-free DNA)
data.prep: Streck (cell-free DNA preservation) tube mandatory. Note GA on form. Do not refrigerate or freeze.

data.label: Not applicable
data.prep: 4-6 hours fasting for abdominal USG. Full bladder needed for pelvic/lower abdomen scan.

data.label: Not applicable
data.prep: Full bladder for transabdominal. Empty bladder for TVS. Note cycle day for follicular study.

data.label: Not applicable
data.prep: Note exact gestational age. NT scan: 11-13+6 weeks only. Bring previous scan reports.

data.label: Not applicable
data.prep: No preparation needed. Remove neck jewellery.

default.label: Not applicable
default.prep: Remove metal objects, jewellery. Inform if pregnant.

default.label: Not applicable
default.prep: Remove metal objects. Inform radiographer if pregnant.

data.label: Not applicable
data.prep: Specific preparation required. Confirm with department at time of booking.

default.label: Not applicable
default.prep: Wear comfortable clothing. Remove chest jewellery.

data.label: Not applicable
data.prep: Light meal 3h before. No heavy exercise 12h prior. Wear comfortable shoes. Continue regular medications unless told otherwise.

data.label: Not applicable
data.prep: No bath/shower during recording. Note activities and symptoms in diary. Avoid magnets and metal detectors.

data.label: Red / SST
data.prep: Serial samples at 0, 3, and 6 hours. Mark exact time on each tube. URGENT.

default.label: Not applicable
default.prep: No bronchodilator 4-6h prior (unless testing response). No smoking 4h prior. Loose clothing.

default.label: Multiple tubes as per package
default.prep: 8-12h fasting for most packages. Water allowed. Bring previous reports.

hemolysis.msg: Hemolysis-sensitive test. Avoid prolonged tourniquet, difficult venipuncture, vigorous mixing.

timing.msg: Time-sensitive test. Record exact collection time on tube.

fasting.msg: Fasting required (8-12h). Confirm patient has fasted.

ice.msg: Requires cold chain. Transport on ice immediately.

protect_light.msg: Protect from light. Wrap in foil after collection.

order.msg: Collect before starting antibiotics if possible.

PA_PREP.fasting_blood:
OnePLUS Lab - Patient Instructions

Your tests require FASTING:
- Fast for 8-12 hours
- Water is allowed
- Take regular medications with water unless advised otherwise
- Come between 7-10 AM

OnePLUS Ultrasound Lab, Pitampura
011-4248 0101
PA_PREP.urine_routine:
OnePLUS Lab - Patient Instructions

For URINE test:
- Collect first morning urine
- Clean the area before collecting
- Collect midstream (let first stream go)
- Bring in clean container

OnePLUS Ultrasound Lab, Pitampura
011-4248 0101
PA_PREP.urine_24h:
OnePLUS Lab - Patient Instructions

24-HOUR URINE COLLECTION:
1. Day 1 morning: Discard first urine
2. Collect ALL urine for 24 hours in the large container provided
3. Keep container in refrigerator
4. Day 2 morning: Add last urine, bring to lab
5. Note start and end time

OnePLUS Ultrasound Lab, Pitampura
011-4248 0101
PA_PREP.semen:
OnePLUS Lab - Patient Instructions

For SEMEN ANALYSIS:
- Maintain 2-5 days sexual abstinence
- Collect by masturbation in sterile container
- Do NOT use condom or lubricant
- Keep at body temperature
- Deliver to lab within 30 minutes

OnePLUS Ultrasound Lab, Pitampura
011-4248 0101
PA_PREP.usg_abdomen:
OnePLUS Lab - Patient Instructions

For ABDOMINAL ULTRASOUND:
- Fast for 4-6 hours (no food/drinks)
- Water is allowed
- Wear loose, comfortable clothing

For PELVIC/LOWER ABDOMEN USG:
- Drink 4-6 glasses of water 1 hour before
- Do NOT urinate before the scan
- Full bladder is needed

OnePLUS Ultrasound Lab, Pitampura
011-4248 0101
PA_PREP.hormone:
OnePLUS Lab - Patient Instructions

For HORMONE tests:
- Note: For female hormones, mention Day of menstrual cycle
- No special fasting required unless specified
- Come to lab in the morning

OnePLUS Ultrasound Lab, Pitampura
011-4248 0101
PA_PREP.culture:
OnePLUS Lab - Patient Instructions

For CULTURE tests:
- Collect BEFORE starting antibiotics if possible
- For URINE culture: clean area, discard first stream, collect midstream
- Bring to lab immediately
- Keep at room temperature (not refrigerated)

OnePLUS Ultrasound Lab, Pitampura
011-4248 0101
PA_PREP.echo_tmt:
OnePLUS Lab - Patient Instructions

For TMT/STRESS TEST:
- Light meal 3 hours before test
- No heavy exercise 12 hours prior
- Wear comfortable clothes and shoes
- Continue regular heart medications unless told otherwise
- Bring previous ECG/reports

OnePLUS Ultrasound Lab, Pitampura
011-4248 0101
PA_PREP.pft:
OnePLUS Lab - Patient Instructions

For SPIROMETRY/PFT:
- No bronchodilator inhaler 4-6 hours before
- No smoking 4 hours before
- Wear loose, comfortable clothing
- Eat light meal (avoid heavy meal)

OnePLUS Ultrasound Lab, Pitampura
011-4248 0101
PA_PREP.lbc_pap:
OnePLUS Lab - Patient Instructions

For PAP SMEAR / LBC:
- Do NOT collect during menstruation
- No intercourse 48 hours before
- No douching or vaginal medication 48 hours before
- Mid-cycle (Day 14) is ideal

OnePLUS Ultrasound Lab, Pitampura
011-4248 0101
